title: lepidium hirtum subsp. oxyotum
intro: Lepidium hirtum subsp. oxyotum, also known as cressleaf groundsel or a type of wild mustard, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve digestion, and support immune function. Lepidium hirtum subsp. oxyotum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
